title: Mod List
description: Mod List allows you to do /mods and shows the installed mods on your server/client.
body:
# 📚 Mod List

A clean, simple, and powerful way to view and manage your mods.

Mod List gives you an easy-to-use interface to see exactly what mods are installed, making modpacks and setups more organized and user-friendly.

---

## ✨ Features

- 📖 Clean Mod Overview
  - View all installed mods in one place
  - Organized and easy-to-read layout

- ⚡ Lightweight & Fast
  - Minimal performance impact
  - Loads instantly with your game

- 🧩 Modpack Friendly
  - Perfect for modpacks and large setups
  - Helps players quickly understand what’s installed

- 🔍 Helpful Information
  - Displays mod names clearly
  - Great for debugging and troubleshooting

---

## 🎮 Perfect For

- Modpack creators
- Players with lots of mods installed
- Servers sharing mod lists
- Anyone who wants a cleaner overview of their mods

---

## 💡 Why Mod List?

Managing mods can get messy fast.

Mod List solves that by giving you a simple, organized view of everything installed—no confusion, no clutter.

---

## 🚀 How To Use

1. Install the mod
2. Launch Minecraft
3. Open Mod List (with /mods)
4. View your installed mods instantly

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

- Works with modern Minecraft versions
- Lightweight and stable
- Designed to work alongside any mod setup

---
